title: Barnwell: Sizing up the DJ Moore, Trent McDuffie blockbuster trades from all angles
content: The NFL's trade market has been active, with the Bills dealing for DJ Moore and the Rams adding Trent McDuffie. What do the moves mean for all four teams?

title: DJ Moore to Bills: Bears to eye Linderbaum? Impact on Allen, draft
content: Will trading Moore's contract enable Chicago to bolster its offensive line? That's one of eight questions we answer.

title: Source: Rams re-sign Curl in another DB splash
content: The Rams are re-signing safety Kam Curl to a three-year, $36 million contract, a source confirmed to ESPN.

title: Ohtani hits grand slam as Japan cruises in WBC
content: Shohei Ohtani hit a grand slam in the second inning as Japan hammered Taiwan 13-0 to win its opener at the World Baseball Classic.

title: Source: DE Hunter gets $40M deal from Texans
content: The Texans have agreed to a one-year, $40 million contract extension with defensive end Danielle Hunter, a source confirmed to ESPN.

title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
content: In his limited time on the court, Trae Young proved in his Wizards debut that he is the type of player the team hasn't had since John Wall, thrilling the D.C. crowd and finishing with 12 points in a 122-112 loss to the Jazz.

title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
content: LeBron James made the 15,838th field goal of his career to pass Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most made field goals in NBA history.

title: Judge rules Beasley owes $1M to former agency
content: A federal judge in New York issued a $1 million civil judgment against NBA free agent Malik Beasley on Thursday in a contract dispute with his former agency.

title: White: 'No issues' with Hearn after Aspinall deal
content: Dana White has "no issues" with Tom Aspinall signing a business deal with Eddie Hearn and denied ever questioning his champion's eye injury.

title: Pens' Malkin ejected for slashing, could face ban
content: Penguins forward Evgeni Malkin received a five-minute major penalty and a game misconduct for slashing the Sabres' Rasmus Dahlin in the head during Thursday's game.

title: ⚾ MLB Rank: Ranking baseball's top 100 players
content: From star sluggers like Ohtani and Judge to top pitchers like Skubal, we rank -- and make predictions for -- the best players in baseball right now.

title: Men's Bracketology: Potential bid thieves to watch in Champ Week
content: Last year, we had no bid thieves -- but as Champ Week gets underway, plenty of teams look vulnerable.

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Ohio State, Miami create separation with key wins
content: The Buckeyes and Canes solidified their standings on the right side of the respective Big Ten and ACC bubbles.

title: Why Tatum is coming back now and what it means for Boston
content: Jayson Tatum's return to Boston, after a devastating Achilles injury, could shift the NBA's balance of power.

title: What to know for all 32 teams ahead of NFL free agency: Top needs, candidates to leave and predictions
content: Malik Willis, Tyler Linderbaum, Mike Evans and Jaelan Phillips are worth keeping an eye on when free agency opens March 11.

title: What 20 NFL free agents could earn next week: Projecting contracts, guarantees and landing spots
content: Dan Graziano made calls around the NFL to get a sense of how contracts might look for 20 free agents and then made predictions on exact terms.

title: World Baseball Classic predictions: Will Japan repeat or is United States the team to beat?
content: Our experts make their picks for every round of the 2026 WBC -- from pool play through the championship game.

title: Is your favorite player missing from the WBC? How insurance mess shaped the tournament
content: An ex-USA captain denied. A decimated squad that almost left. Even Bad Bunny got involved. What gives?

title: Women's Bracketology: Big wins for BYU, Arizona State push them right to the bubble
content: Two teams making the most of Champ Week? BYU and Arizona State, which now both sit just beyond the 68.

title: Ranked: The 10 worst Premier League teams that spent too much money on being bad
content: Tottenham are on pace for Premier League relegation despite spending lots of cash. Where do they rank among the worst teams relative to spending?

title: The best teams in Europe: Can anybody touch Barcelona, Bayern?
content: As the calendar turns into March, we've seen more than enough in 2026 so far to rank the most in-form clubs.

title: 'Right now, I could be UFC champion': Bella Mir is the future face of fighting
content: With Dana White as her mentor, the daughter of heavyweight champ Frank grapples for an NCAA title this weekend.

title: School of scandal: Coach allegedly moonlighted as a pimp
content: Multiple dismissals have occurred at Cal State Bakersfield as an investigation probes who knew what and when.

title: 'Nobody sleeps for like a month': How WNBA GMs will squeeze in drafts, free agency once CBA in place
content: As CBA negotiations linger, the time to conduct drafts and free agency gets shorter. We asked WNBA GMs how they're preparing.

title: How a 21-year-old prodigy and a 38-year-old veteran ended up with the same fight
content: UFC 326 features a fight between Raul Rosas Jr. and Rob Font in an ultimate battle of youth vs. experience.

title: 'I'll close my eyes': Diamondbacks' Counsell makes pro debut against father Craig's Cubs
content: Brady Counsell got his first reps as a Diamondback on Thursday when he was named to the club's roster for a spring training clash with the Cubs, who are managed by his father.

title: Inside a surprise dance performance from UCLA women's basketball stars
content: Lauren Betts, Gabriela Jaquez and Charlisse Leger-Walker high kicked their way onto the UCLA dance team.

title: The craziest F1 start ever? Why Australian Grand Prix might see chaos from the start
content: Grand prix starts have always held the potential for chaos, but this year there's almost guaranteed drama when the lights go out in Australia on Sunday. ESPN explains why.

title: 2026 MLB betting guide: Our favorite prop bet for every team
content: Looking for a prop bet on your favorite team? Our experts break down the standouts for all 30 MLB teams.

title: USMNT Big Board: Who should make Pochettino's USMNT roster for March camp?
content: It's the month of the final matches for the USMNT before its pre-World Cup camp. Who is looking good, and who is on the outside looking in for Mauricio Pochettino's squad?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal forced to let one key player go this summer
content: Arsenal must offload a first-term player in the summer to balance their books, but who could it be? Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Russia giving Iran real-time intel on US warships, aircraft: Report
content: Russia is reportedly sharing intelligence on US military assets in the Middle East with Iran, potentially aiding Tehran's targeting of American forces. This alleged assistance, detailed by officials, could explain the precision of recent Iranian strikes. While the US downplays Russian involvement, the move highlights shifting geopolitical alliances amid ongoing regional conflicts.

title: Nitish Kumar heads to Delhi, how JD(U) faces its defining test in Bihar
content: Bihar's political landscape shifts as Nitish Kumar opts for a Rajya Sabha seat, stepping down as Chief Minister. This move marks the end of an era dominated by Jayaprakash Narayan's disciples and leaves the Janata Dal (United) in uncharted territory without a clear successor.

title: 'Send the chopper': Stuck in India, Windies player asks Cristiano to 'rescue' him
content: West Indies spinner Akeal Hosein expressed frustration over the team's delayed return from India following their T20 World Cup exit, even jokingly asking Cristiano Ronaldo for a rescue.  International travel disruptions due to escalating geopolitical tensions have impacted the squad's journey home, despite Cricket West Indies arranging a charter flight.

title: Thousands are reportedly seeing private moments recorded on Meta’s Smart Glasses
content: Private moments captured by Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses are being reviewed by thousands of workers in Kenya. These workers label video feeds to train artificial intelligence. The footage includes intimate acts and personal activities. Workers report seeing sensitive content without subjects' knowledge. This data labeling operation raises significant privacy concerns.

title: Gulf to stop energy exports within weeks, warns Qatar
content: Gulf energy exporters face potential export shutdowns within weeks due to escalating Iran-US-Israel conflict, warns Qatar's energy minister. This could trigger oil prices to $150 a barrel and severely impact global economies. Qatar has already declared force majeure on LNG exports after an Iranian drone strike, with full recovery expected to take months.

title: Not Varun Chakravarthy, Kapil Dev names this cricketer as 'number one bowler'
content: Kapil Dev lauded Jasprit Bumrah as the world's number one bowler after his crucial spell in India's T20 World Cup semi-final win over England. He also praised Sanju Samson's consistent batting. India now faces New Zealand in the final, aiming for multiple historic achievements.

title: Microsoft becomes first company to say it is not 'abandoning' Anthropic
content: Microsoft will continue to integrate Anthropic's AI models into its products, despite the Department of War designating the startup as a supply-chain risk. The company's legal team reviewed the designation and concluded Anthropic's offerings, excluding those for the Department of War, can remain available to customers.

title: 'Man of the match was Bumrah': Pathan disagrees with official award decision
content: Irfan Pathan lauded Jasprit Bumrah's match-winning spell in India's T20 World Cup semi-final win over England. Pathan highlighted Bumrah's exceptional skill set and ability to perform under pressure, stating India is fortunate to have such a rare talent. Bumrah's crucial overs, including pinpoint yorkers, significantly hampered England's chase, despite a high-scoring encounter.

title: Inside the paradox of Mexico's never-ending war on drugs
content: The decades-long war on drugs, initiated by Nixon, has devolved into a geopolitical quagmire. The recent death of cartel leader El Mencho, hailed as a victory, quickly led to widespread chaos, demonstrating how successes in combating drug trafficking often breed deeper crises and more violence across Latin America.

title: $3,700,000,000 in first 100 hours: The cost of Trump's Op Epic Fury against Iran
content: A new CSIS report reveals the US military campaign against Iran has cost an estimated $3.7 billion in its first 100 hours, with most of this spending unbudgeted. The daily cost is approximately $891.4 million, driven by extensive munitions use and advanced system deployment. The Pentagon may seek a $50 billion supplemental funding request from Congress to replenish depleted resources.

title: Indonesia becomes latest country to block social media access for kids under 16
content: Indonesia will begin restricting social media access for children under 16 on March 28, gradually deactivating accounts on platforms like TikTok and Facebook. This policy aims to protect minors from online risks such as cyberbullying, fraud, and addiction. The move aligns with global trends of governments implementing measures to safeguard young users online.

title: ‘You are the X-factor’: Team India backs Varun Chakravarthy ahead of final
content: Despite a costly outing in the semifinal, India's team management and senior players back mystery spinner Varun Chakravarthy as their potential match-winner for the T20 World Cup final.  Vice-captain Axar Patel emphasised the importance of mental strength and trusting his plans, believing Varun Chakravarthy can still deliver a crucial performance.

title: Amid US-Iran conflict, don't forget this war: It matters more for India
content: Pakistan's escalating conflict with the Taliban in Afghanistan is turning deadly, diverting attention from the US-Israel-Iran war.  Operation Ghazab lil Haq targets militants, but civilian areas are reportedly hit, causing fear and displacement. The fighting exposes a strategic reality that has been building for years: Pakistan’s long-standing Taliban strategy has collapsed, and the fallout is now spilling across South Asia.

title: 'I will not relent': Judge keeps Shilo Sanders locked in $12 million bankruptcy fight
content: A federal judge just refused to let Shilo Sanders walk away from a trustee’s complaint tied to an $11.89 million judgment and alleged bankruptcy law violations. The ruling keeps his NIL money under a microscope, pushes the case toward trial, and leaves his football future hanging on a 2015 hallway incident that will not go away.

title: Allu Arjun extends financial support to actress Pavala Shyamala
content: Telugu actor Allu Arjun has extended significant financial support to veteran actress Pavala Shyamala, who is facing severe health and financial difficulties. The 'Pushpa' star has arranged for a fixed monthly sum of Rs. 10,000 to aid Shyamala and her daughter, a gesture widely praised by fans for its consistent and thoughtful nature.

title: Bangladesh name squad for first series after withdrawing from T20 World Cup
content: Bangladesh has unveiled its squad for the upcoming three-match ODI series against Pakistan, commencing March 11 in Dhaka. Afif Hossain makes a return, while Litton Das is included despite recent form. Key players Hasan Mahmud and Tanzim Hasan Sakib are sidelined due to injuries. The selection panel expressed confidence in Das's potential to bolster the middle order.

title: Watch: US rains precision strikes on Iran as Middle East war enters Day 7
content: The Middle East conflict intensifies as it enters its seventh day. United States forces conduct precision strikes on Iranian assets. Israel launches new attacks targeting regime infrastructure. Missile launches from Iran trigger air-raid alerts in Israel. Gulf nations report drone and missile threats. Humanitarian concerns rise with displacement and casualties.

title: Who is Anuj Agnihotri, the UPSC CSE 2025 topper?
content: The Union Public Service Commission has announced the Civil Services Examination 2025 final results, recommending 958 candidates for the Indian Administrative Service, Indian Foreign Service, Indian Police Service and other central services. Anuj Agnihotri from Rawatbhata in Rajasthan secured Rank 1. A medical graduate from AIIMS Jodhpur, he began civil services preparation after completing his internship in 2023.

title: Market crash: Sensex down nearly 1,100 points - top reasons for fall
content: Stock market today: BSE Sensex closed at 78,918.90, down 1,097 points or 1.37%. Investors reacted to intensifying tensions involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

title: Epstein files: Woman claims Trump sexually assaulted her as minor
content: Newly released FBI documents detail a woman's allegations of sexual assault by Donald Trump, introduced by Jeffrey Epstein, when she was a minor. The woman also reported receiving threats to remain silent, which she linked to Epstein. Trump has denied all allegations, while Democrats accuse the Trump administration of withholding damaging information.

title: ‘Like having a genie’: Faf in awe of Bumrah after India’s dramatic semifinal win
content: Former South Africa captain Faf du Plessis lauded Jasprit Bumrah as a "genie" after his crucial spell helped India secure a seven-run victory over England in the T20 World Cup semifinal. Du Plessis emphasised Bumrah's match-winning ability across formats, highlighting his unique action that makes him difficult for batsmen to read and capitalise on even when he misses his length.

title: 'Want to finish this one first': After Iran and Venezuela, Trump hints Cuba could be next
content: President Trump indicated the U.S. may shift its focus to Cuba after resolving the situation in Iran. He praised Senator Marco Rubio's work on Cuba, suggesting a future return for "unbelievable people." This comes as Cuba faces an energy blockade, exacerbating its economic crisis.

title: UPSC CSE 2025 final result out: 958 recommended for civil services
content: The Union Public Service Commission has announced the final results of the Civil Services Examination 2025 after the written test and personality interviews. A total of 958 candidates have been recommended for appointment to the Indian Administrative Service, Indian Foreign Service, Indian Police Service and other Central Services. The commission has also maintained a reserve list of 258 candidates. The results remain subject to verification of reservation claims and other eligibility conditions.

title: Israel-Iran war: What US 30-day waiver on Russian oil means for India - explained
content: Around 90% of India’s crude oil is imported - and around 40-50% of India’s crude oil imports come from the Middle East, particularly after it substantially reduced purchases of Russian crude oil.

title: ‘Axar is filling Jadeja's void well’: Gavaskar hails ‘unbelievable’ fielding
content: Legendary Sunil Gavaskar lauded Axar Patel's exceptional fielding in India's T20 World Cup semifinal win.  Axar's spectacular catches, particularly dismissing Harry Brook and contributing to Will Jacks' wicket, were pivotal in halting England's chase. Gavaskar believes Axar is stepping up to fill the void left by Ravindra Jadeja as a complete all-rounder.

title: Watch: Israel shares video of precision strikes in Beirut; Hezbollah's military infrastructure hit
content: The Israeli Defense Forces conducted a significant overnight strike in Beirut, targeting Hezbollah's headquarters and military infrastructure within a densely populated area. This action, described as the twenty-sixth wave of strikes, followed Hezbollah's alleged violation of a truce and its involvement in opening a new front in the ongoing conflict.

title: MP horror: Man bludgeons 16-year-old boy to death with hammer, eats his flesh and drinks blood
content: A shocking incident unfolded in Damoh where a 16-year-old boy was brutally murdered. Eyewitnesses claim the accused then engaged in cannibalistic acts. Police have arrested the suspect, who has a prior murder conviction. The investigation into the motive behind this horrific crime is ongoing. The victim's body has been sent for postmortem.

title: A somber mood in Khomeini’s ancestral village in UP
content: News of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's assassination has deeply affected Barabanki, India, the ancestral village of his predecessor Khomeini. Residents expressed sorrow and anger, with protests against the US and Israel erupting. Khamenei's great-grandfather, Sayed Ahmad Musavi 'Hindi', originated from Kintoor village before migrating to Iran.

title: ‘Come of age’: Shastri hails Samson, backs Abhishek ahead of T20 WC final
content: Former India head coach Ravi Shastri lauded Sanju Samson's T20 World Cup 2026 resurgence, highlighting his improved mental fortitude and smarter play. Samson's match-winning knocks, including a semifinal 89, have been pivotal. Shastri also backed struggling opener Abhishek Sharma, urging faith in his abilities for the final against New Zealand.

title: US-Iran war impact: India asks refiners to step up LPG output to avoid cooking gas shortage - report
content: Around two-thirds of India’s LPG demand is met through imports, with the Middle East accounting for roughly 85 to 90 per cent of those supplies. Oil refiners have been told to maximise LPG output by ensuring that the propane and butane available with them are fully utilised for cooking gas production, the report said.

title: 25k for 3rd child: Andhra unveils India's first draft population management policy
content: In a groundbreaking move, Andhra Pradesh is introducing an innovative population growth initiative aimed at encouraging families to expand. The state government will provide ₹25,000 and complimentary education through high school for families welcoming a third child, as well as covering IVF costs and offering longer parental leave.

title: 'Cause for concern': No heatwave yet but UV radiation already a worry in Bengaluru, Kerala
content: South India is experiencing an unusual surge in ultraviolet radiation, with Bengaluru hitting an 'extreme' UV Index of 13. This rise, more concerning than moderate temperatures, poses significant health risks including sunburn and skin cancer. Kerala has also issued radiation alerts, urging precautions for outdoor workers and the public to avoid prolonged sun exposure during peak hours.

title: Axar Patel picks tougher of his two ‘stunning’ catches — Watch & choose yours
content: Axar Patel's spectacular fielding heroics were pivotal in India's nail-biting T20 World Cup semifinal win against England.  His incredible diving catch to dismiss Harry Brook and a crucial relay catch to get Will Jacks broke vital partnerships.  Patel deemed the Brook catch tougher, though the Jacks dismissal was more significant for the match's outcome.

title: I am a tribal man, can I seek mutual divorce from my SC wife? Chhattisgarh high court says yes
content: The Chhattisgarh High Court overturned a Family Court's rejection of a mutual-consent divorce petition. The court ruled that Section 2(2) of the Hindu Marriage Act is protective, not exclusionary, allowing a Scheduled Tribe member who married under Hindu customs to seek divorce under the Act. The case was remitted for a decision on merits.

title: Jayadeva Heart Hospital in Mysuru to be expanded to 600 beds
content: In his budget, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah said ₹180 crore will be spent on expanding the cardiac care facility

title: No shortage of energy in India: Minister Hardeep Puri
content: Indian Oil Corporation rubbished reports on social media suggesting a shortage of petrol and diesel, and termed them as baseless

title: State committed to take steps to uplift SCs, says CM
content: The demand for categorisation of SCs is justified and Telangana is the first State to implement it, says Revanth Reddy

title: Shortage of petrol, diesel ‘baseless’; no need to panic: IndianOil
content: Earlier this week, sources in the government, had stated that India had 25 days each of crude oil stocks and energy products, that is, petrol and diesel

title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
content: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

title: Budget lacks concrete plans to address farmers’ distress: Shanthakumar
content: He says Karnataka currently ranks second in the country in terms of farmer suicides, yet the budget does not include any effective schemes to prevent such tragedies

title: Clever elephant-herd outsmarts kumkis, raids crops along Chittoor–TN border
content: Villagers report elephants often enter human habitations soon after dusk, knocking against compound gates and occasionally doors of houses before retreating to the valley by dawn

title: Ghaziabad most-polluted city in India during 2025-26 winters, followed by Noida and Delhi: Report
content: At least 204 out of 238 Indian cities with sufficient monitoring data recorded average winter PM2.5 concentrations above India's National Ambient Air Quality Standards (NAAQS), up from last year's 173 cities, the CREA analysis said

title: West Asia conflict: Over 140 flights cancelled at four airports in India
content: While the total flight cancellations at the Bangalore airport were 33, including 15 departures and 18 arrivals, at the Delhi airport, 15 departures and 14 arrivals were cancelled

title: 100 acres allotted for ARAI facility in Mandya: CM
content: The Chief Minister responds to Union Minister H.D. Kumaraswamy’s appeal for granting land to set up the R and D centre in his parliamentary constituency in Mandya; announces allocation while presenting his budget

title: Govt. mulling stricter norms to strengthen food safety, says Health Minister Satya Kumar
content: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India will be consulted to put in place stronger deterrence, the Minister informs the Legislative Assembly

title: ‘Success of PM Modi’s strategic oil diplomacy’: BJP hails 30-day U.S. waiver to purchase Russian oil
content: The BJP also accuses the Congress and Rahul Gandhi of creating panic by spreading “fake news on oil shortage”

title: DTC directs colleges and schools to follow safety norms
content: All buses will be issued fitness certificates only after thorough inspection during the summer holidays, he says

title: ‘Good news’ that Kerala Story-2 is not being widely watched, says Rahul Gandhi
content: While interacting with college students in Kerala, the Congress leader says movies, television and media have increasingly been ‘weaponised’ to create division in society

title: Tiruchi police brace for visits by CM Stalin and PM Modi
content: Prime Minister to reach Tiruchi from Kochi by special flight and participate in two programmes; Chief Minister M.K. Stalin will reach Siruganur from Tiruchi by road

title: Airfares of special flights from West Asia to India soar
content: The exorbitantly high airfares prompts passengers to demand that international airfares to and from West Asia be capped.

title: Karnataka Budget 2026-27: Kalyana Karnataka projects routed largely through KKRDB funds
content: Several education, health and infrastructure initiatives in the backward region proposed through the development board’s special grants

title: After years of pillion-riding, BJP readies to take the driving seat in Bihar
content: Whoever gets the CM’s chair will have the unenviable task of governing Bihar and also be the mascot of the transition that the State’s polity and the BJP make in the post-Nitish Kumar era

title: DYFI alleges attempt to undermine Assam Public Service Commission ‘scam’ probe report
content: The government recently tabled an action taken report (ATR) in the 126-member Assembly, nearly three years after it made the report of the Justice Biplab Kumar Sharma-led inquiry commission public

title: Budget 2026-27: Kalyana Karnataka Chamber of Commerce and Industry seeks stronger industrial push for Kalyana Karnataka
content: The Kalyana Karnataka Chamber of Commerce and Industry (KKCCI) has expressed concern that the State Budget for 2026-27 has not adequately addressed development and industrial needs of Kalyana Karnataka, which continues to lag behind other parts of the State

title: Foundation laid for India’s first riverine lighthouses
content: Minister for Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Sarbananda Sonowal, initiated the work at four strategic locations along the Brahmaputra River

title: 'Cannot revert to nations believing might is right': Kapil Sibal condoles Khamenei's assassination
content: “I am sure the global community will come together, no matter what their differences are, to enter into a dialogue, resolve the issues and let global peace be maintained,” the Independent Rajya Sabha MP said

title: Karnataka Budget: CM proposes human-animal conflict mitigation programme for next five years
content: Siddaramaiah, in his budget, stated that the government spent ₹1,044 crore over the last three years to mitigate the conflict

title: MHA allows enhanced 7-yr deputation for central police forces, Assam Rifles personnel joining NSG
content: The  is the federal counter-terrorist force and its commandos are called 'Black Cats' because of the black-colour overalls they wear during combat

title: Help daughters ‘trapped’ by men assuming fake identities, Gujarat Deputy CM tells women at temple event
content: Deputy CM Harsh Sanghavi says the BJP government in the State is moving ahead with strength to take strict action against criminals involved in such cases

title: Mariana L. Neisuler assumes charge as Consul General of the United States, Chennai
content: Ms. Neisuler was the Counsellor for Political and Economic Affairs at the U.S. Embassy in Tashkent before being posted in Chennai

title: Andhra Pradesh Assembly passes resolution to realise Atmanirbhar Viksit Bharat -Swarnandhra Vision by 2047
content: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu called upon each one of the MLAs to contribute to the mission so that Andhra Pradesh would become a progressive State

title: Karnataka Budget 2026: Intermediate Ring Road, Miyawaki parks, municipal bonds for Bengaluru
content: To ensure future growth and sustainable land-use planning, a new Revised Master Plan 2041 (RMP) for Bengaluru will be implemented by the end of 2027, and a Comprehensive Mobility Plan (CMP) will be prepared within six months

title: Udayagiri South police station to be opened in Mysuru
content: The announcement in the State Budget comes months after the Government approved a proposal to divide the existing Udayagiri police station into Udayagiri North and Udayagiri South police stations

title: Karnataka Budget: Mysuru gets healthcare, aerospace and tourism projects
content: Among the key announcements is the expansion of the Sri Jayadeva Institute of Cardiovascular Sciences and Research in Mysuru from the existing 400-bed facility to a 600-bed hospital at a cost of ₹180 crore

title: Kochi Corporation, KWA explore water connections for residents of ERG Colony
content: Matter taken up by authorities after AAP district secretary lodges complaint on the Chief Minister’s portal

title: Kerala’s Operation Cyhunt: Kozhikode City police target 114 suspected bank accounts in cyber fraud crackdown;  25 cases registered
content: Raids were carried out in 91 locations in Kozhikode city. District Police Chief (Kozhikode city) said two suspects were arrested, apart from serving notice on 21 other account holders

title: Resolution seeking Speaker Birla’s removal follows rules, debate must take place in Lok Sabha: Congress
content: The Lok Sabha is likely to take up the notice to move a resolution to remove Mr. Birla from office for allegedly acting in a ‘blatantly partisan’ manner; the House will witness a rare moment when he will not chair the proceedings but will be seated among the members

title: Karnataka Budget 2026: Hubballi-Dharwad gets Skill Training Academy, Indira Canteens for students, plug & play LEAP lab
content: Setting up Indira Canteens for the thousands of candidates preparing for competitive examinations was one of the demands during the recent protests by job aspirants in Dharwad

title: Rumours of fuel crisis due to Iran conflict spread panic in U.P.’s Lakhimpur
content: District supply officer dismissed the rumours as baseless and said there was enough stock of fuel; he warned that strict action will be taken against anyone found hoarding petroleum products

title: 22 children in institutional care in Ernakulam await two months of family warmth
content: These children were were selected from 900-odd inmates across 49 CCIs in Ernakulam for the annual two-month Vacation Foster Care (VFC) programme

title: Budget 2026: Karnataka to push renewable energy with new scheme under KUSUM-C model, boost solar and EV charging infrastructure
content: Over the last three years, the government has spent ₹48,000 crore on free electricity subsidy, benefiting 36 lakh irrigation pump sets, and supporting 21 lakh farmers, who form the backbone of the State’s agriculture sector

title: India denies assisting U.S. in targeting Iranian vessel; Navy sources call claims baseless
content: India had not provided any assistance to U.S. authorities or its military in relation to the Iranian warship, says Navy official; the official adds that existing India-U.S. communication and logistics agreement do not automatically apply to such situations

title: Andhra Pradesh mulls over ban on social media for children below 13
content: A programme to implement the restriction is likely to be rolled out within the next 90 days, the Chief Minister told the Legislative Assembly

title: Mamata begins sit-in against voter roll deletions, alleges BJP-EC ‘conspiracy’ ahead of Bengal polls
content: The State CM accused the BJP and the ECI of conspiring to “disenfranchise Bengali voters” and vowed to expose them

title: Budget 2026: Transportation subsidy for North Karnataka sericulture farmers doubled to ₹20 per kg
content: Although government cocoon markets exist in Jewargi and Mudhol in north Karnataka, many farmers prefer selling their produce in larger markets, like in Ramanagara, where the presence of a large number of reelers ensures competitive prices

title: Karnataka Budget 2026: IVF centres planned in Bengaluru and Kalaburagi, Victoria Hospital in Bengaluru to be renamed after Shantaveri Gopalagowda
content: ₹620 crore has been allocated for construction of medical colleges, hospitals and super-speciality hospitals across Karnataka

title: Marriage hall owner booked under SC/ST Act for denying venue to a family in Perundurai
content: The family, belonging to a Scheduled Caste community, complained that the owner said he would neither provide the hall nor arrange food for members of the community

title: Congress hits out at Modi for 'ceding diplomatic space', Rahul terms him 'compromised'
content: The Congress and its president Mallikarjun Kharge echoed the sentiment in separate social media posts hitting out at the government on its foreign policy and for "continuously ceding diplomatic space"

title: Elderly woman found dead at home in Coimbatore gated community
content: The woman lived with her son, who was away on a trip, and their domestic worker. The police said the worker is missing, and her phone was found near the house

title: Karnataka Budget 2026: Comprehensive tourism plan for coastal region
content: 1,000 ‘smaraka mitras’ will be trained to protect 844 protected monuments and 1,000 unprotected monuments across Karnataka

title: Former UGC chief Jagadesh Kumar appointed Chairman of Board of Governors, IIM Calcutta
content: M Jagadesh Kumar has been appointed for the post for a period of four years after approval from President Droupadi Murmu

title: Karnataka Budget 2026: New initiatives to support eco-friendly farm practices, efficient use of water, embrace AI tech
content: The budet has proposed ‘Vasudhamruta’ programme to promote eco-friendly and sustainable agricultural practices by enhancing organic carbon content of soil, along with its physical, chemical, and biological properties

title: Baramati plane crash: Work on final report has started, says Union Minister Mohol
content: “As per the provisions, the preliminary report in any plane crash should be submitted within a month of the incident. In the present plane crash, the preliminary report has been submitted. With many other agencies carrying out probes, the work on the final report has now begun,” says Union Minister

title: CPI(M) in Kerala extends olive branch to veteran leader G. Sudhakaran amid estrangement signals
content: CPI(M) State committee member and former MP C.S. Sujatha and Alappuzha district secretariat member G. Harishankar call on Sudhakaran at his house. Sujatha, however, later downplays the visit, calling it “routine”

title: No third party can download FIR from new T.N. police website
content: Only the accused, the victim, or the complainant in a case can access and download the FIR through the newly launched portal

title: Protest over Zuari dam project in Goa Assembly; four detained
content: Protesters were part of agitation against proposed dam on the Zuari River at Mirabag village in Kushawati district, where villagers have been staging a sit-in protest for the last 25 days against project, over fear that 500 houses would be inundated due to reservoir

title: Legal action against P.K. Sasi under consideration, says CPI(M) Palakkad secretary Suresh Babu
content: Sasi, a former MLA, had alleged that a prime accused in a spirit smuggling case was elevated to the party district leadership, an apparent reference to Babu. Following this, Sasi was expelled from CPI(M)

title: Free bus travel facility in APSRTC buses for SSC students

title: Absconding doctor taken into custody in Angamaly ‘hit-and-run’ case in Kerala

title: Court orders framing charges against Farooq Abdullah, others in JKCA ‘scam’ case
